title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Category Manager in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd!
